scripts.test:e2e: ts-node scripts/invoke-test.ts --check --prompt 'Read the thread once. With run_bash, execute GH_TOKEN="$(github-app-token)" gh repo view "$GH_REPO" --json nameWithOwner. Then create /workspace/agentcore-smoke.txt containing exactly AgentCore smoke test passed, verify it with read_file, reply with exactly AgentCore smoke test passed, and mark done.'
